items.title: Scientists Discover New Earth-Like Exoplanet in Habitable Zone
items.summary: Astronomers using the James Webb Space Telescope have identified a rocky exoplanet orbiting within the habitable zone of a nearby star, showing signs of a stable atmosphere that could support liquid water.

items.title: Breakthrough CRISPR Therapy Reverses Rare Genetic Disorder in Clinical Trial
items.summary: A landmark clinical trial has shown that a single CRISPR gene-editing treatment was able to fully reverse symptoms of a rare inherited blood disorder in 94% of patients, marking a new era in genetic medicine.

items.title: New AI Model Predicts Protein Folding with Near-Perfect Accuracy
items.summary: Researchers have developed an AI system that can predict the 3D structure of previously unseen proteins with over 99% accuracy, potentially accelerating drug discovery and the treatment of diseases like Alzheimer's.

items.title: Ancient Antarctic Ice Core Reveals Fastest Climate Shift in 800,000 Years
items.summary: Analysis of a newly extracted ice core from East Antarctica shows evidence of an abrupt atmospheric CO2 spike roughly 130,000 years ago, giving scientists a rare window into past climate tipping points.

items.title: Physicists Achieve Room-Temperature Superconductivity in New Material
items.summary: A team of physicists has reported achieving superconductivity at room temperature in a hydrogen-rich compound under moderate pressure, a long-sought milestone that could revolutionize energy transmission and storage.
